com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class POSLinkModem.ConnectResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkModem.ConnectResult
  • Enclosing class:
    POSLinkModem

    public static class POSLinkModem.ConnectResult
extends java.lang.Object
    The result for connection. If connect success, it will use RESULT_CONNECT_OK. Otherwise the result is other values.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String MODEM_CANCEL_KEY_PRESSED
      The hardware cancel key may be pressed.
      static java.lang.String MODEM_LINE_BUSY
      The line is busy.
      static java.lang.String MODEM_LINE_UNCONNECTED 
      static java.lang.String MODEM_NO_RESPONSE
      No response
      static java.lang.String MODEM_NOT_PROPERLY_CONNECTED
      The line may not connect properly or the voltage is too low.
      static java.lang.String MODEM_TELEPHONE_OCCUPIED
      The telephone is occupied
      static java.lang.String RESULT_CONNECT_ERROR
      General connect error.
      static java.lang.String RESULT_CONNECT_OK 
      static java.lang.String RESULT_NOT_IN_CONNECT_STATUS
      Not in connect status.
